Power.Choice.Title: Choice
Power.Choice.Description: Pick which power you want from a given selection
Power.Choice.Lore: A curious bubble that shifts and reforms itself into other power bubbles.
Power.ChargeShot.Title: Charge Shot
Power.ChargeShot.Description: Increases the Y:damage of your Y:[secondary attack] by Y:50% G:(+50% per stack) and the Y:size of your Y:[secondary attacks] by 40% G:(+40% per stack)
Power.ChargeShot.Brief: Increases the size and damage of your secondary attack
Power.Shotgun.Title: Shotgun
Power.Shotgun.Description: Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your Y:[primary attack] by Y:20% G:(+20% per stack)
Power.Shotgun.Brief: Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your primary attack
Power.Dash.Title: Sparkle Sparkle
Power.Dash.Description: Y:Dashing releases Y:2 G:(+1 per stack) damaging stars
Power.Dash.Brief: Adds damaging stars to your ability
Power.ShotSpeed.Title: Bubble Propulsion
Power.ShotSpeed.Description: Small bubbles travel Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) further and faster
Power.ShotSpeed.Brief: Small bubbles travel further and faster
Power.Starbarbs.Title: Starbarbs
Power.Starbarbs.Description: Enemies Y:[killed by stars] explode into Y:3 G:(+1 per stack) stars
Power.Starbarbs.Brief: Enemies killed by stars explode into stars
Power.SoapySoap.Title: Soapy Soap
Power.SoapySoap.Description: Y:[Secondary attack] releases Y:4 G:(+4 per stack) bubbles while traveling, plus Y:[2 more bubbles for each charge level]
Power.SoapySoap.Brief: Secondary attack leaves behind a trail of bubbles
Power.BubbleBlast.Title: Bubble Blast
Power.BubbleBlast.Description: Y:[Secondary attack] releases Y:4 G:(+3 per stack) bubbles upon expiring, plus Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) Y:[more bubbles for each charge level]
Power.BubbleBlast.Brief: Secondary attack releases bubbles upon expiring
Power.Starshot.Title: Starshot
Power.Starshot.Description:
Y:15% G:(+5% per stack) Y:chance to launch stars with your Y:[primary attack] 
Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your Y:[primary attack] by Y:20% G:(+20% per stack)
Power.Starshot.Brief: Launch stars with your primary attack
Power.WeaponUpgrade.Title: Haste
Power.WeaponUpgrade.Description: Increases Y:[attack speed] by Y:7% G:(+7% per stack)
Power.BinaryStars.Title: Binary Stars
Power.BinaryStars.Description: Release Y:2 G:(+1 per stack) stars every Y:[1.5 seconds]
Power.EternalBubbles.Title: Elder Bubbles
Power.EternalBubbles.Description: Increases lifespan of Y:[small bubbles] by Y:[0.8 seconds] G:(+0.4 seconds per stack)
Power.BubbleBirb.Title: Bubble Birb
Power.BubbleBirb.Description: Resurrect in a dance of flames after death G:(consumed on use)
Power.BubbleBirb.Brief: Resurrect in a dance of flames after death
Power.BubbleTrail.Title: Bubble Trail
Power.BubbleTrail.Description: Release a bubble every Y:[0.67 seconds] G:(-33% per stack)
Power.Coalescence.Title: Coalescence
Power.Coalescence.Description: Y:[Small bubbles] may fuse with up to Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) other nearby Y:[small bubbles,] gaining Y:[+2 damage] and Y:[+1 pierce] each fusion
Power.Coalescence.Brief: Small bubbles may fuse with nearby bubbles for bonus damage and pierce
Power.LuckyStar.Title: Lucky Star
Power.LuckyStar.Description:
Enemies Y:[killed by stars] have an additional Y:4% G:(+1% per stack) Y:chance to Y:[drop powers] 
This effect can only happen Y:3 G:(+1 per stack) Y:times per Y:wave
Power.LuckyStar.Brief: Enemies killed by stars have an additional chance to drop powers
Power.TrailOfThoughts.Title: Trail of Thoughts
Power.TrailOfThoughts.Description: Increases the Y:[maximum length] of your Y:[thought trail] by Y:3 G:(+3 per stacK) and Y:[zap radius] of your Y:[thought trail] by Y:10% G:(+10 per stack)
Power.TrailOfThoughts.Brief: Increases thought trail length and zap radius
Power.Magnet.Title: Magnet
Power.Magnet.Description: Extends the distance Y:coins are collected from by Y:75% G:(+75% per stack)
Power.SpearOfLight.Title: Spear of Light
Power.SpearOfLight.Description: Fire Y:[beams of light] at enemies within Y:9 G:(+2.25 per stack) Y:units for Y:[2 damage] every Y:[2.2 seconds] and increase Y:[beam of light damage] by Y:0.5 G:(+0.5 per stack)
Power.SpearOfLight.Brief: Periodically fire beams of light at nearby enemies
Power.Overclock.Title: Overclock
Power.Overclock.Description: Reduces Y:[ability cooldown] by Y:20% G:(+20% per stack)
Power.NeuronActivation.Title: Reflection
Power.NeuronActivation.Description: Enemies Y:[struck by beams of light] bounce Y:[beams of light] to nearby enemies once; bounced Y:[beams of light gain 20%] G:(+60% per stack) Y:damage
Power.NeuronActivation.Brief: Enemies struck by beams of light fire beams of light at nearby enemies
Power.BrainBlast.Title: Brain Blast
Power.BrainBlast.Description:
Release Y:20% G:(+10% per stack) more bubbles when Y:[channeling recall] and explode into Y:1 G:(+0.5 per stack) additional bubbles per segment Y:[after recall] 
Increase Y:[thought trail zap damage] by Y:20% G:(+20% per stack)
Power.BrainBlast.Brief: Release additional bubbles when recalling and increase thought trail zap damage
Power.Raise.Title: Raise
Power.Raise.Description: Increases Y:[maximum chip stack height] by Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) and reduces Y:[ability cooldown] by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack)
Power.Raise.Brief: Increases maximum chip stack height and slightly reduces ability cooldown
Power.AllIn.Title: All-In
Power.AllIn.Description:
Increases Y:[total chip stacks] by Y:2 G:(+2 per stack) and grants a Y:5% G:(+5% per stack) Y:chance for chips to be enhanced 
Increases Y:[maximum chip stack height] by Y:2 G:(+2 per stack) and reduces Y:[ability cooldown] Y:multiplicatively by Y:60% G:(+60% per stack)
Power.AllIn.Brief: Greatly increases the potency of your chips
Power.SnakeEyes.Title: Snake Eyes
Power.SnakeEyes.Description: Y:20% G:(+1% per stack) Y:chance to poison enemies on hit, dealing Y:4 G:(+1 per stack) Y: damage plus Y:damage equal to Y:4% of the Y:[victim's max life] over Y:[10 seconds]
Power.SnakeEyes.Brief: Chance to poison enemies on hit
Power.Refraction.Title: Refraction
Power.Refraction.Description: Y:[Beams of light] target up to Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) additional enemies within Y:9 G:(+2 per stack) Y:units, but they Y:[lose 20% damage] each hit after the first
Power.Refraction.Brief: Beams of light can target an additional enemy
Power.Calculator.Title: Calculator
Power.Calculator.Description: Friendly projectiles Y:[seek out] enemies within Y:4 G:(+2 per stack) Y:units
Power.BubbleMitosis.Title: Mitosis
Power.BubbleMitosis.Description: Y:[Upon obtaining your next power,] gain Y:[additional stacks] equal to the amount of <color=#BAE3FE>Mitosis</color> stacks G:(consumed on use)
Power.BubbleMitosis.Brief: Assimilated into next power you obtain
Power.RollForCharisma.Title: Roll For Charisma
Power.RollForCharisma.Description: Y:20% G:(+1% per stack) Y:chance to Y:heal after Y:[purchasing a power] or gain Y:25 G:(+25 per stack) Y:coins if uninjured
Power.RollForCharisma.Brief: Chance to heal or refund a portion of money spent when purchasing power
Power.RollForDexterity.Title: Roll For Dexterity
Power.RollForDexterity.Description: Y:20% G:(+1% per stack) Y:chance to gain Y:15% increased Y:[movement speed] after using Y:[your ability,] stacking up to Y:2 G:(+1 per stack) times and lasting Y:[5 seconds]
Power.RollForDexterity.Brief: Chance to gain increased speed after using your ability
Power.RollForInitiative.Title: Roll For Initiative
Power.RollForInitiative.Description: Y:20% G:(+1% per stack) Y:chance to deal Y:200% G:(+20% per stack) Y:[bonus damage] on Y:[first strike]
Power.RollForInitiative.Brief: Chance for first hit to deal additional damage
Power.RollForPerception.Title: Roll For Perception
Power.RollForPerception.Description: Increases weights of Y:[rare powers] in the Y:[power pool] by Y:20% G:(+20% per stack)
Power.RollForPerception.Brief: Chance of seeing rare powers increased
Power.BubbleShield.Title: Bubble Shield
Power.BubbleShield.Description:
Gain Y:[1 shield slot] and Y:[recover 1 shield] on pickup or at the start of Y:[even-numbered waves] 
When a Y:[shield is broken,] extend Y:[immunity frames] by Y:40% G:(+20% per stack) and release Y:24 G:(+8 per stack) bubbles
Power.BubbleShield.Brief:
Gain a shield on even-numbered waves
When shields are broken, extend immunity frames and release bubbles
Power.ZapRadius.Title: Zap Radius
Power.ZapRadius.Description: Increases Y:[thunder bubble radius] by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack)
Power.Electroluminescence.Title: Electroluminescence
Power.Electroluminescence.Description: Y:[Thunder bubbles] fire Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) Y:[beams of light] at enemies within Y:3 G:(+0.5 per stack) Y:units of the Y:[thunder bubble radius] for Y:[2 damage]
Power.Electroluminescence.Brief: Thunder bubbles fire beams of light at nearby enemies
Power.Burger.Title: Burger
Power.Burger.Description:
Increases Y:[attack speed] and Y:damage by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) 
Reduces Y:[movement speed] by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack)
Power.BonusBatteries.Title: Bonus Batteries
Power.BonusBatteries.Description: Increases the number of Y:[thunder bubbles] you can cast by Y:1 G:(+1 per stack)
Power.BonusBatteries.Brief: Increases the number of thunder bubbles you can cast
Power.ResearchNotes.Title: Research Notes
Power.ResearchNotes.Description: Y:[After killing 3 Skull enemies,] become a <color=#CFCFFF>Choice</color> with 5 options G:(consumed on use)
Power.ResearchNotes.Brief: After killing 3 Skull enemies, become a Choice with 5 options
Power.ResearchGrants.Title: Research Grants
Power.ResearchGrants.Description: Y:[Skull enemies] drop Y:3 G:(+2 per stack) additional Y:coins
Power.Boomerang.Title: Electric Boomerang
Power.Boomerang.Description: Increases Y:[thunder bubble] recall damage by Y:50% G:(+50% per stack)
Power.ThunderBubbles.Title: Echo Bubbles
Power.ThunderBubbles.Description: When recalled or after expiring, Y:[thunder bubbles] leave behind a Y:[latent charge] that dissipates into Y:3 G:(+1 per stack) bubbles after Y:[thunder bubbles] are fully recalled
Power.ThunderBubbles.Brief: Thunder bubbles release bubbles when recalled or expired
Power.Supernova.Title: Supernova
Power.Supernova.Description:
Stars have a Y:[20% chance] to Y:detonate on hit for Y:10 G:(+5 per stack) Y:damage 
Activates <color=#BAE3FE>Starbarbs</color> and <color=#BAE3FE>Lucky Star</color>
Power.Supernova.Brief: Stars have a chance to explode
Power.ResonanceRuby.Title: Resonance Ruby
Power.ResonanceRuby.Description:
Increases the Y:quality of Y:[wave rewards] by Y:20% G:(+20% per stack) 
<color=#FFED75>Wave end</color> gains an additional Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) Y:chance to contain a Y:[bonus power reward]
Power.DoubleDown.Title: Double Down
Power.DoubleDown.Description:
Enemies Y:[killed by chips] drop additional Y:coins equal to the Y:[overkill damage dealt] up to a Y:[maximum of 5 coins] G:(+3 per stack) 
Increases Y:[chip damage] by Y:1 G:(+1 per stack)
Power.DoubleDown.Brief: Enemies killed by chips drop additional coins and increases chip damage
Power.FocusFizz.Title: Focus Fizz
Power.FocusFizz.Description: Increases Y:[critical strike chance] by Y:5% G:(+5% per stack)
Power.Coupons.Title: Coupons
Power.Coupons.Description: Reduces the cost of Y:powers in the Y:shop by Y:12% G:(+12% per stack)
Power.Coupons.Brief: Reduces the cost of powers in the shop
Power.CloudWalker.Title: Cloud Walkers
Power.CloudWalker.Description: Increases Y:[movement speed] by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack)
Power.PerpetualBubbleMachine.Title: Perpetual Bubble Machine
Power.PerpetualBubbleMachine.Description:
Adds Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) <color=#CFCFFF>Choice</color> to Y:[wave end] 
R:[Rainbow Shard replication cost increases with stack size]
Power.PerpetualBubbleMachine.Brief: The key to infinite bubble forever?
Power.ConsolationPrize.Title: Consolation Prize
Power.ConsolationPrize.Description:
Increases Y:[non-winning spin damage] and Y:[secondary attack damage] by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) 
Y:7.77% Y:chance to gain Y:2 G:(+2 per stack) Y:coins on Y:[non-winning spins] 
R:[Increases spin price by 0.25] G:(+0.25 per stack) R:coins
Power.ConsolationPrize.Brief: Increases non-winning spin damage, secondary attack damage, and gives a chance for consolation coins
Power.Pity.Title: Pity Charm
Power.Pity.Description:
Each consecutive Y:[non-Jackpot spin] increases Y:[Jackpot chance] by Y:4% G:(+2% per stack) 
R:[Increases spin price by 0.25] G:(+0.25 per stack) R:coins
Power.Pity.Brief: Increases Jackpot chance after consecutive spins without a Jackpot
Power.TokenPouch.Title: Token Pouch
Power.TokenPouch.Description:
Increases the number of Y:tokens you can hold by Y:2 G:(+2 per stack) 
R:[Increases spin price by 0.25] G:(+0.25 per stack) R:coins
Power.BOGOSpin.Title: Buy One Get One
Power.BOGOSpin.Description:
Get a Y:[Bonus spin] on Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) of Y:spins 
Each Y:[Bonus spin] has Y:77.7% increased Y:[attack speed] for Y:[every spin that came before it] 
R:[Increases spin price by] R:1 G:(+1 per stack) R:coins
Power.BOGOSpin.Brief: Sometimes get a Bonus spin for free
Power.PhilosophersStone.Title: Philosopher's Stone
Power.PhilosophersStone.Description:
Increases Y:damage of Y:[high-rarity spins] by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) and Y:[high-rarity spins] drop Y:50% G:(+50% per stack) more Y:coins on hit 
R:[Increases spin price by] R:2 G:(+2 per stack) R:coins
Power.PhilosophersStone.Brief: Increases the damage dealt and coins dropped by high-rarity spins
Power.RouletteWheel.Title: Roulette Wheel
Power.RouletteWheel.Description:
Increases the Y:[burst count] of your Y:[primary attack] by Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) 
Each Y:[burst] has Y:7.77% increased Y:[attack speed] for Y:[every burst in the same spin that came before it] 
R:[Increases spin price by] R:4 G:(+4 per stack) R:coins
Power.BatterUp.Title: Batter Up
Power.BatterUp.Description: Y:[Secondary attack] launches Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) Y:[Curveball Tokens] for Y:[50% secondary attack damage] that drop Y:1 Y:token on kill
Power.BatterUp.Brief: Let's hit it out of the park!
Power.PiratesBooty.Title: Pirate's Booty
Power.PiratesBooty.Description:
Y:[Skull enemies] have a Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) Y:chance to drop a Y:[Pirate chest] or Y:key G:(consumed on use) 
Drops a Y:key when Y:dissolved in a Y:Crucible
Power.PiratesBooty.Brief: Next killed Skull enemy has a chance to drop a chest or key
Power.Eureka.Title: Eureka!
Power.Eureka.Description: Reduces <color=#CFCFFF>Choice</color> Y:Reroll cost by Y:5 G:(+5 per stack) Y:gems and increases Y:[Reroll] count by Y:1 G:(+1 per stack)
Power.Eureka.Brief: Reduces Choice Reroll cost and increases Reroll count
Power.BlackMarketDelivery.Title: Special Delivery
Power.BlackMarketDelivery.Description: Each Y:[Skull Wave] has a Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) Y:chance to drop a Y:[Black Market crate] G:(consumed on use)
Power.BlackMarketDelivery.Brief: The next Skull Wave has a chance to deliver a Black Market crate
Power.ShardsOfPower.Title: Shards of Power
Power.ShardsOfPower.Description:
Drops Y:[3 Rainbow Shards] when Y:dissolved in a Y:Crucible 
Y:[Rainbow Shards] can be used to Y:duplicate any Y:power you have
Power.Contract.Title: Contract
Power.Contract.Description: Y:Trade for a Y:power from a given selection
Power.RainbowFlower.Title: Rainbow Flower
Power.RainbowFlower.Description:
Drops a Y:[Rainbow Shard] when Y:dissolved in a Y:Crucible, with a Y:[50% chance] for an Y:[additional shard, rolled until failure] 
Y:[Rainbow Shards] can be used to Y:duplicate any Y:power you have
Power.QuantumCake.Title: Quantum Cake
Power.QuantumCake.Description: Drops a Y:[Heart] and becomes a <color=#FFAAAA>Schrodinger's Cake</color> when Y:dissolved in a Y:Crucible
Power.QuantumCake.Brief: And you can eat it too!
Power.EatenCake.Title: Schrodinger's Cake
Power.EatenCake.Description: Becomes a <color=#FFAAAA>Quantum Cake</color> at the start of a Y:wave G:(consumed on use)
Power.EatenCake.Brief: And you can have it too!
Power.GlassShard.Title: Glass Knife
Power.GlassShard.Description:
All attacks deal Y:+1 G:(+1 per stack) Y:[bonus damage] 
R:[When hurt,] roll Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) times for a Y:[50% chance] to take Y:[additional damage]
Power.BountyHunter.Title: Bounty Hunter
Power.BountyHunter.Description: Y:[Skull enemies] have a Y:4% G:(+2% per stack) Y:chance to drop a Y:[Pirate chest, a key, 3 gems, or 50 coins]
Power.BountyHunter.Brief: Skull enemies have a chance to drop extra loot
Power.BonusFizz.Title: Bottle Burst
Power.BonusFizz.Description: Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your Y:[primary attack] by Y:20% G:(+20% per stack)
Power.BonusFizz.Brief: Increases the amount of bubbles shot by your primary attack
Power.BottleBlast.Title: Bottle Blast
Power.BottleBlast.Description: Y:[Secondary attack] releases Y:4 G:(+4 per stack) additional bubbles on impact
Power.BottleFlip.Title: Bottle Flip
Power.BottleFlip.Description: Y:[Secondary attack] bounces and Y:explodes Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) additional times
Power.BottleFlip.Brief: Secondary attack bounces and explodes an additional time
Power.FancyFootwork.Title: Fancy Footwork
Power.FancyFootwork.Description:
Gain a Y:20% G:(+10% per stack) chance to Y:[dodge damage] 
Chance to Y:dodge reduced by Y:50% for each Y:[consecutive dodge]
Power.CarbonForce.Title: Carbon Force
Power.CarbonForce.Description: Small bubbles gain Y:+1 G:(+1 per stack) Y:pierce and travel Y:10% G:(+10% per stack) further and faster
Power.CarbonForce.Brief: Small bubbles get additional pierce and travel further
Power.FlavorExplosion.Title: Flavor Explosion
Power.FlavorExplosion.Description:
Small bubbles Y:splash on hit or upon expiring for Y:20% G:(+5% per stack) Y:damage 
Y:[Splash size] scales with Y:damage
Power.FlavorExplosion.Brief: Small bubbles splash on hit or upon expiring
Power.SplashRadius.Title: Splash Radius
Power.SplashRadius.Description: Increases Y:[cola splash radius] by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack)
Power.BonusBoards.Title: Bonus Boards
Power.BonusBoards.Description: Release Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) additional Y:Skateboards on Y:dismount
Power.Kickflip.Title: Kickflip
Power.Kickflip.Description:
Increases Y:[movement speed] by Y:15% G:(+15% per stack) while Y:mounting or Y:dismounting your Y:Skateboard 
Increases Y:Skateboard Y:damage by Y:1 G:(+1 per stack)
Power.Kickflip.Brief: Faster movement while mounting or dismounting Skateboard
Power.RetaliatoryBlast.Title: Retaliatory Blast
Power.RetaliatoryBlast.Description:
Drop a Y:10 G:(+10 per stack) Y:[damage bath bomb when hurt] 
Y:[Explosion size] scales with Y:damage
Power.RetaliatoryBlast.Brief: Drop a high-damage bath bomb when hurt
Power.BombasticBrew.Title: Bombastic Brew
Power.BombasticBrew.Description:
Secondary attack drops a Y:2 G:(+2 per stack) Y:[damage bath bomb] 
Y:[Explosion size] scales with Y:damage
Power.BombasticBrew.Brief: Secondary attack drops a bath bomb
Power.CollateralDamage.Title: Collateral Damage
Power.CollateralDamage.Description:
Y:[Skull enemies] drop a Y:5 G:(+5 per stack) Y:[damage bath bomb] 
Y:[Explosion size] scales with Y:damage
Power.CollateralDamage.Brief: Skull enemies drop a bath bomb when killed
Power.ClusterBombs.Title: Cluster Bombs
Power.ClusterBombs.Description:
Y:[Bath bombs] drop Y:smaller Y:50% G:(+50% per stack) Y:[damage bath bombs] 
Y:[Explosion size] scales with Y:damage
Power.ClusterBombs.Brief: Bath bombs drop smaller bath bombs
Power.SharpBombs.Title: Sharp Bombs
Power.SharpBombs.Description:
Y:[Bath bombs] release Y:50% G:(+50% per stack) more Y:shrapnel 
Increases lifespan of Y:shrapnel by Y:10% G:(+10% per stack)
Power.PrizeBombs.Title: Prize Bombs
Power.PrizeBombs.Description: Enemies drop Y:10 G:(+10 per stack) additional Y:coins when killed by Y:[bath bombs] or Y:shrapnel
Power.PrizeBombs.Brief: Enemies drop coins when killed by bath bombs
Power.Restock.Title: Restock
Power.Restock.Description:
All Y:shops gain Y:+1 G:(+1 per stack) Y:stock 
Y:[Gems restock] an additional Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) extra Y:powers
Power.Restock.Brief: All shops gain additional stock and bonus stock on restock
Power.CrystalSerum.Title: Crystal Serum
Power.CrystalSerum.Description: Enemies have a Y:20% chance to drop Y:1 G:(+1 per stack) Y:gems
Power.CrystalSerum.Brief: Enemies have a chance to drop gems
Power.LightningInABottle.Title: Lightning in a Bottle
Power.LightningInABottle.Description: After starting a Y:[wave,] your next Y:3 G:(+3 per stack) attacks will Y:[instantly kill enemies]
Power.LightningInABottle.Brief: First few attacks in a wave do infinite damage
